message.content:
Explore this Raycast UI clone project thoroughly. I need to understand:

1. What components exist in src/components/ (list all directories and files)
2. What the App.tsx currently looks like (read it)
3. What types exist in src/types.ts
4. What mock data exists in src/data/
5. What hooks exist in src/hooks/
6. What styles exist in src/styles/
7. Read the package.json to understand scripts and dependencies

This is a Raycast pixel-perfect clone built with React 19, Vite 6, Sass, TypeScript, and Bun. I need a comprehensive understanding of the current state to plan next tasks.

content.text: I'll explore this Raycast UI clone project thoroughly to understand its current state.

1→{
     2→  "name": "lol",
     3→  "version": "0.1.0",
     4→  "private": true,
     5→  "type": "module",
     6→  "description": "Raycast clone for internal use.",
     7→  "repository": {
     8→    "type": "git",
     9→    "url": "https://github.com/antoniopresto/lol"
    10→  },
    11→  "author": "@antoniopresto <antoniopresto@gmail.com>",
    12→  "packageManager": "bun@1.3.6",
    13→  "workspaces": [
    14→    "packages/*"
    15→  ],
    16→  "engines": {
    17→    "node": ">=20.0.0"
    18→  },
    19→  "scripts": {
    20→    "build": "vite build",
    21→    "dev": "vite",
    22→    "test": "vitest run --passWithNoTests",
    23→    "test:watch": "vitest --watch --passWithNoTests",
    24→    "coverage": "vitest --coverage",
    25→    "check": "run-s check:*",
    26→    "check:types": "tsc --noEmit",
    27→    "check:lint": "eslint src --fix",
    28→    "check:format": "prettier --write ."
    29→  },
    30→  "devDependencies": {
    31→    "@belt/prettier-plugin": "latest",
    32→    "@eslint/js": "^10.0.1",
    33→    "@testing-library/jest-dom": "^6.9.1",
    34→    "@testing-library/react": "^16.3.2",
    35→    "@testing-library/user-event": "^14.6.1",
    36→    "@types/bun": "latest",
    37→    "@types/dompurify": "^3.2.0",
    38→    "@types/jsdom": "^28.0.0",
    39→    "@types/node": "^25.0.3",
    40→    "@types/react": "^19.2.14",
    41→    "@types/react-dom": "^19.2.3",
    42→    "@vitejs/plugin-react": "^5.1.4",
    43→    "@vitest/coverage-v8": "^4.0.18",
    44→    "eslint": "^10.0.2",
    45→    "eslint-plugin-react-hooks": "^7.0.1",
    46→    "eslint-plugin-react-refresh": "^0.5.2",
    47→    "jsdom": "^28.1.0",
    48→    "npm-run-all": "^4.1.5",
    49→    "prettier": "^3.7.4",
    50→    "prettier-plugin-organize-imports": "^4.3.0",
    51→    "sass": "^1.97.3",
    52→    "typescript": "^5.9.3",
    53→    "typescript-eslint": "^8.56.1",
    54→    "vite": "^7.3.1",
    55→    "vitest": "^4.0.18"
    56→  },
    57→  "dependencies": {
    58→    "dompurify": "^3.3.1",
    59→    "marked": "^17.0.3",
    60→    "react": "^19.2.4",
    61→    "react-dom": "^19.2.4"
    62→  }
    63→}

content.text:
Excellent. Now I have a comprehensive understanding of the project. Let me provide a detailed report.

---

## Comprehensive Project Exploration Report: Raycast UI Clone

### 1. Components in src/components/

The project has a well-organized component structure with 11 major component groups:

#### **action_panel/** (Action Panel & Dropdown)
- `/Users/anotonio.silva/antonio/lol/src/components/action_panel/action_panel.tsx`
- `/Users/anotonio.silva/antonio/lol/src/components/action_panel/action_panel.scss`
- `/Users/anotonio.silva/antonio/lol/src/components/action_panel/action_panel.test.tsx`
- `/Users/anotonio.silva/antonio/lol/src/components/action_panel/actions_dropdown.tsx`
- `/Users/anotonio.silva/antonio/lol/src/components/action_panel/actions_dropdown.scss`
- `/Users/anotonio.silva/antonio/lol/src/components/action_panel/actions_dropdown.test.tsx`

#### **command_palette/** (Main Container)
- `/Users/anotonio.silva/antonio/lol/src/components/command_palette/command_palette.tsx`
- `/Users/anotonio.silva/antonio/lol/src/components/command_palette/command_palette.scss`

#### **detail/** (Detail View with Metadata)
- `/Users/anotonio.silva/antonio/lol/src/components/detail/detail.tsx`
- `/Users/anotonio.silva/antonio/lol/src/components/detail/detail.scss`
- `/Users/anotonio.silva/antonio/lol/src/components/detail/detail_metadata.tsx`
- `/Users/anotonio.silva/antonio/lol/src/components/detail/index.ts`

#### **empty_state/** (Empty State Component)
- `/Users/anotonio.silva/antonio/lol/src/components/empty_state/empty_state.tsx`
- `/Users/anotonio.silva/antonio/lol/src/components/empty_state/empty_state.scss`

#### **form/** (Form Components with Fields)
- `/Users/anotonio.silva/antonio/lol/src/components/form/form.tsx`
- `/Users/anotonio.silva/antonio/lol/src/components/form/form.scss`
- `/Users/anotonio.silva/antonio/lol/src/components/form/form_field.tsx`
- `/Users/anotonio.silva/antonio/lol/src/components/form/form_text_field.tsx`
- `/Users/anotonio.silva/antonio/lol/src/components/form/form_text_area.tsx`
- `/Users/anotonio.silva/antonio/lol/src/components/form/form_dropdown.tsx`
- `/Users/anotonio.silva/antonio/lol/src/components/form/form_checkbox.tsx`
- `/Users/anotonio.silva/antonio/lol/src/components/form/form_date_picker.tsx`
- `/Users/anotonio.silva/antonio/lol/src/components/form/index.ts`

#### **grid/** (Grid View with Context)
- `/Users/anotonio.silva/antonio/lol/src/components/grid/grid.tsx`
- `/Users/anotonio.silva/antonio/lol/src/components/grid/grid.scss`
- `/Users/anotonio.silva/antonio/lol/src/components/grid/grid_context.tsx`
- `/Users/anotonio.silva/antonio/lol/src/components/grid/grid_item/grid_item.tsx`
- `/Users/anotonio.silva/antonio/lol/src/components/grid/grid_item/grid_item.scss`
- `/Users/anotonio.silva/antonio/lol/src/components/grid/index.ts`

#### **icons/** (Icon Components)
- `/Users/anotonio.silva/antonio/lol/src/components/icons/icons.tsx`

#### **kbd/** (Keyboard Shortcut Display)
- `/Users/anotonio.silva/antonio/lol/src/components/kbd/kbd.tsx`
- `/Users/anotonio.silva/antonio/lol/src/components/kbd/kbd.scss`

#### **list/** (List View with Context)
- `/Users/anotonio.silva/antonio/lol/src/components/list/list.tsx`
- `/Users/anotonio.silva/antonio/lol/src/components/list/list.scss`
- `/Users/anotonio.silva/antonio/lol/src/components/list/list.test.tsx`
- `/Users/anotonio.silva/antonio/lol/src/components/list/list_context.tsx`
- `/Users/anotonio.silva/antonio/lol/src/components/list/list_context.test.tsx`
- `/Users/anotonio.silva/antonio/lol/src/components/list/list_section/list_section.tsx`
- `/Users/anotonio.silva/antonio/lol/src/components/list/list_section/list_section.scss`

#### **loading_bar/** (Loading Indicator)

- `/Users/anotonio.silva/antonio/lol/src/components/loading_bar/loading_bar.scss`

#### **search_bar/** (Search Bar with Breadcrumbs)
- `/Users/anotonio.silva/antonio/lol/src/components/search_bar/search_bar.tsx`
- `/Users/anotonio.silva/antonio/lol/src/components/search_bar/search_bar.scss`
- `/Users/anotonio.silva/antonio/lol/src/components/search_bar/search_bar.test.tsx`

#### **toast/** (Toast Notifications)
- `/Users/anotonio.silva/antonio/lol/src/components/toast/toast.tsx`
- `/Users/anotonio.silva/antonio/lol/src/components/toast/toast.scss`
- `/Users/anotonio.silva/antonio/lol/src/components/toast/toast_container.tsx`
- `/Users/anotonio.silva/antonio/lol/src/components/toast/toast_container.scss`

---

### 2. App.tsx Structure

The `/Users/anotonio.silva/antonio/lol/src/App.tsx` file (650 lines) is the main application orchestrator with:

**State Management:**
- Query state for search functionality
- Selected index tracking for keyboard navigation
- Actions dropdown state
- Drilled item state for detail view navigation
- View mode state: 'list' | 'grid' | 'form'
- Snippet form state with validation errors
- Toast notifications via useToast hook

**Key Features:**
- Three view modes: List view (default), Grid view (Color Picker), Form view (Create Snippet)
- Breadcrumb navigation system
- Keyboard shortcuts: Cmd+K (actions), Cmd+N (new snippet), Cmd+Enter (submit form)
- Real-time search filtering for both sections and colors
- Detail panel integration showing markdown content and metadata
- Toast notifications for user feedback

**Component Composition:**
- CommandPalette wrapper with loading bar
- SearchBar with breadcrumbs and active descendant tracking
- Dynamic body with List/Grid/Form views
- Detail panel for selected items
- ActionPanel with dropdown actions
- ToastContainer for notifications

---

### 3. Types in src/types.ts

The `/Users/anotonio.silva/antonio/lol/src/types.ts` file defines:

**ListItemData:**
- id, title, subtitle, icon, accessories, detail

**ListItemAccessoryData:**
- text, icon (optional decorative elements)

**ListItemDetailData:**
- markdown content, metadata entries

**ListItemMetadataEntry (Union Type):**
- label: title + text
- link: title + text + target URL
- tag-list: title + array of tags with colors
- separator: visual divider

**SectionData:**
- title, items array

**GridItemData:**
- id, title, subtitle, icon

**ColorItemData (extends GridItemData):**
- Adds color property for color picker

---

### 4. Mock Data in src/data/

The `/Users/anotonio.silva/antonio/lol/src/data/mock_data.ts` file contains:

**MOCK_SECTIONS (3 sections):**

1. **Suggestions** (3 items):
   - Clipboard History (with detailed markdown and metadata)
   - Search Snippets
   - Search Emoji & Symbols

2. **Commands** (5 items):
   - Window Management
   - Calculator
   - Define Word
   - System Monitor
   - Color Picker (triggers grid view)

3. **Applications** (5 items):
   - Safari, Visual Studio Code, Terminal, Figma, Slack
   - Each with icon, metadata, markdown descriptions

**MOCK_COLORS (12 colors):**
- System colors: Red, Orange, Yellow, Green, Teal, Blue, Indigo, Purple, Pink, Brown, Gray, White
- Each with hex color code and subtitle

All items use icon components from `/Users/anotonio.silva/antonio/lol/src/components/icons/icons.tsx`

---

### 5. Hooks in src/hooks/

**use_toast.ts** (`/Users/anotonio.silva/antonio/lol/src/hooks/use_toast.ts`):

Implementation details:
- Auto-dismiss after 3000ms
- Exit animation 200ms
- Manages toast lifecycle with timers
- Supports styles: 'info' | 'success' | 'error'
- Queue-based system (new toasts appear at top)
- Cleanup on unmount

API:
- `show({ style?, title, message? })` - returns toast ID
- `hide(id)` - dismisses specific toast
- `toasts` - array of active toasts

---

### 6. Styles in src/styles/

**_tokens.scss** (`/Users/anotonio.silva/antonio/lol/src/styles/_tokens.scss`):

Design tokens include:
- **Colors**: Background (#1a1a1c), Surface (#262628), Borders, Text hierarchy, Accent (#007aff), Success, Destructive
- **Typography**: Font families (SF Pro Text, SF Mono), Sizes (11px-20px), Weights
- **Spacing**: Scale from 2px to 32px ($space-half to $space-8)
- **Radius**: sm (4px), md (8px), lg (12px), xl (16px)
- **Shadows**: Window shadow, Popover shadow
- **Transitions**: Fast (80ms), Normal (150ms), Slow (250ms)
- **Component sizes**: Search bar height (46px), Grid icon (64px)

**global.scss** (`/Users/anotonio.silva/antonio/lol/src/styles/global.scss`):

Global styles:
- Box-sizing border-box reset
- Font smoothing for macOS
- Custom scrollbar styling (6px width, semi-transparent)
- Selection color (accent with 30% opacity)
- Keyframe animations: palette-appear, action-panel-slide-up
- Reduced motion support for accessibility

---

### 7. Package.json Analysis

**Scripts:**
- `dev`: Vite dev server
- `build`: Production build
- `test`: Vitest run
- `test:watch`: Watch mode
- `coverage`: Coverage reports
- `check`: Runs types, lint, format in sequence

**Key Dependencies:**
- **Runtime**: React 19.2.4, React DOM 19.2.4
- **Utilities**: marked (markdown), dompurify (sanitization)

**Dev Dependencies:**
- **Build**: Vite 7.3.1, @vitejs/plugin-react 5.1.4
- **TypeScript**: 5.9.3 with strict mode
- **Testing**: Vitest 4.0.18, @testing-library/react 16.3.2, jsdom 28.1.0
- **Styling**: Sass 1.97.3
- **Linting**: ESLint 10.0.2, typescript-eslint 8.56.1, Prettier 3.7.4
- **Package Manager**: Bun 1.3.6

**Testing Setup:**
- Vitest with jsdom environment
- Setup file: `/Users/anotonio.silva/antonio/lol/src/test_setup.ts`
- Coverage with v8
- Testing library for React components

---

### Project Patterns & Architecture

**Component Structure:**
- Each component has its own .scss file
- Components use React Context for shared state (ListContext, GridContext)
- Keyboard navigation built into List and Grid components
- File naming: snake_case (list_item.tsx, use_toast.ts)

**Testing Coverage:**
- Unit tests exist for: ActionPanel, ActionsDropdown, List, ListContext, ListItem, SearchBar
- Tests use Vitest + React Testing Library
- 6 test files identified in src/components

**State Management:**
- No external state management (Redux, Zustand)
- Local state with hooks
- Context API for component trees (List, Grid)
- Custom hook for toast notifications

**Accessibility:**
- ARIA roles (listbox, role attributes)
- Active descendant pattern for keyboard navigation
- Reduced motion support
- Semantic HTML structure

**Type Safety:**
- Strict TypeScript mode enabled
- Comprehensive type definitions in types.ts
- No 'any' types (following project guidelines)

This is a production-ready, pixel-perfect Raycast clone with professional code quality, comprehensive component library, and proper testing infrastructure.
